network.title: Network Error
network.message: Unable to reach the server. Please check your connection.
network.apiUnreachable: Network error: Unable to reach the API server

api.generic: An error occurred while communicating with the server
api.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
api.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource
api.forbidden: Access to this resource is forbidden
api.notFound: The requested resource was not found
api.serverError: Internal server error. Please try again later.
api.conflict: This item was modified elsewhere. Please refresh and try again.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist

boundary.title: Something went wrong

boundary.details: An unexpected error occurred. If the problem persists, please contact support.

toast.accessDeniedAction: You do not have permission to perform this action.
toast.syncSettingFailed: Failed to sync setting across tabs
